title: Jungle Villager Trader
description: Adds a Jungle Trader, a new Structure, and a Ocelot Armor
body:
**This mod adds a new villager to the Jungle.**

The Jungle Villager Trader can only be found in his new temple, which spawns in all types of jungle biomes.

You can also summon him anywhere by placing his Traderblock Workstation (found in every temple structure) next to a jobless villager.
![Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f84e0ddd72222ad11850af1d366a8f172c286ed.jpeg)


Jungle Villager Trader:

Buys and sells Jungle-related items.
Sells a brand-new Ocelot Armor set for the player.
![Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aed106ca69e07d6e86bc8ce50f09402fc8788d4.jpeg)


Ocelot Armor:

Stats are similar to Leather Armor.
Wearing the full set grants the player the speed effect.
Can be repaired with leather.
![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86ac91c6be703f18715ec906cd36c95349d1ee4d.jpeg)


 

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks

Made by Leonxkingx
